text:
AI is transforming the modern workplace in several important ways. One key area is automation, where intelligent systems handle repetitive tasks such as data entry or scheduling. This frees up employees to focus on more creative and strategic work. Productivity tools powered by AI also help workers analyze information faster, manage projects efficiently, and communicate better.

However, rather than replacing humans entirely, the trend is towards human-AI collaboration. Employees work alongside AI systems that provide suggestions or predictions, leaving final decisions to people. This does mean some jobs will change significantly. Workers may need to learn new skills or take on different roles, but many experts believe AI will create more opportunities than it eliminates.
